Dear CFPB Team, I was the victim of identity theft of a Citibank XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX by Citi Bank. From XX/XX/year> through XX/XX/year>XXXX  a number of fraudulent charges were made to my account ( please see attached ). All of these charges were in the NY area. I live in XXXX, IL near XXXX and was never in NY this year. My attempts to resolve this matter with Citi on the phone and at a nearby bank branch have not helped to clear this up. I first opened this card around XXXX when I became a XXXX XXXX and this card was offered to me. I have never used the Citi card except to renew my XXXX membership ( around {$100.00} per year ). My balance on this card should be {$0.00}. 

Please see attached document showing the fraudulent activity on my card. Someone in the NY area obtained a Citi Credit Card with my name on it. The charges shown on page 2 are all fraudulent.

Thanks, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, IL XXXX Ph : XXXX Email : XXXX XXXX
